Create a Hub API instance by specifying the Hub endpoint:
If you don't provide an endpoint, the Hub API automatically selects based on your domain (
All Hub API methods are asynchronous and return promises. They must be called within a user action (like a click) to avoid popup blockers.
within user actions (clicks, touches) to avoid popup blockers. Don't call Hub methods after
headers — they break Hub popup communication.
